name: Night Hotel Bangkok - Sukhumvit 15
detail: I am going to book Dream hotel for the 4th time know!!!! This is the best affordable hotel in Bangkok to my opinion. The hotel is separated in 2 buildings. One hotel is without the swimming pool and the more expensive one (i guess) has the swimming pool. The buildings are 1 minut apart. I have stayed in both of the 2 buildings and they are absolutely great. The rooms are really fabulous and have great comfortable beds. With a nice blue lighting to switch on ore off. They have a perfect airo system. Breakfast is really perfect. You have International foods and Thai dishes. It is a great relaxing get away from Bangkok crowd, but with in 4 minutes you are in the nice crowded area. BTS station is very close, and also great dining area's. Or going out! I already recommended this hotel to two others and they were also very satisfied. So i Will book this for the 4th TIME!!!!!!

name: Boss Suites Nana
detail: I haven't stayed in several hotels in Bangkok anyway, but these were the main features that I was looking for in a hotel. 1) Clean and fresh looking 2) Free fast wifi 3) Good breakfast 4) Friendly staff 5) Good location where it's happening for a Solo traveler like me. Boss suites has it all. It is just the best and is not too pricey. I wouldn't call it a 4 star but it is very clean and well maintained. Since it is a new hotel, the interior, decor etc are really attractive and well planned ( like the see through bathroom just in case u have one of those special guests :). It is still a good hotel for couples and families but not the location) The price through agoda was $41 as advertised but it will be $49 before checkout. That's Agoda not Boss suites. Most of the staff can speak fairly good English and extremely friendly. My experiences with the friendly staff are too many in the two days that I've stayed. There is not one improvement that I can suggest for this hotel and that is not an exaggeration. This definitely is value for money. You can rely on the staff for numerous things like free Tuk-Tuk (They got one for me even after hours), help with getting a cab, help with your room and facilities and also suggestions on going around in Bangkok at the reception. And ya, for all those fun loving, crazy young travelers like me , the hotel offers VIP massages for about 500 Baht. They are all professional masseurs but you can take the massage a litte further if you like to :)

name: Akara Hotel Bangkok
detail: We stayed in this hotel for 4 nights while in Bangkok. The rooms are absolutely BEAUTIFUL, marble everything, great shower, nice tub for baths, free bath bombs, great feeling sheets. You definitely feel like your staying in luxury, but for such a reasonable price! The staff is very attentive and will rush to open the door for you when they see you coming back, carry all your suitcases for you, etc. For the price I don’t think you will be able to find another hotel in Bangkok that offers this much. The breakfast buffet was amazing, they had a western side and Asian side. In the afternoons they serve snacks available to the guests for free from 2pm-5pm which was nice. I would absolutely stay in this hotel again if I come back to Bangkok!

name: Lilit Bang Lumphu Hotel - Close To Khao San Road
detail: Each bunk has curtains that was helpful for privacy.

name: Amara Bangkok Hotel
detail: My wife and I have traveled to 78 countries. We live in north Thailand but avoid Bangkok at all possible costs. Finding Amara located right around the corner from the Russian Embassy (it's the closest hotel) turned out to be an excellent choice. We actually enjoyed staying in Bangkok because the hotel was perfect. Roof top pool with stunning views and amazing food - beef-cheek with mash potatoes and gravy - yum! The room was so well designed we didn't know we are not in a 5 Star hotel. Great shower, excellent lighting. The room lighting controls were the best we've seen in 18 years of travel. Bed was firm, comfortable with great sheets. The breakfast buffet was not included in the room and we felt the high price was too high and not indicative of the food options/quality - but we are fans of whole-foods so more picky than most. We didn't return to breakfast on day two. We would return to the restaurant any time though! Staff greetings and send offs were the most fun - it was like everyone was so happy to be serving us, English was suburb and I thought each Thai could be and English teacher!

name: ibis Bangkok Sukhumvit 4
detail: a very very very very very good hotel ibis nana is a very good hotel and comforts us like staying at my own home when we are staying at ibis nana, it is the world cup 2010.i ask the front desk staff can we watch world cup in the lobby television, the staff immediately says yes and tell us when the world cup is show on live, he will help to switch the television to the channel of the live world cup. that moment i felt that i just stay in a very warm home. also, the staff called jojoe is a hardworking staff. he has a good memory and know us well and treat us like his family members.he guided us the route to the famous big shopping tesco lotus and the naraya bag shop. he also help us to save money and guide us to have sightseeing on the bangkok view by tell us to take bts train instead of take taxi. he just like a master of the family. i hope this positive feedback to ibis nana will not make them proud. i hope they will serve the customers as same as before or better with some tiny things like in a family. i am sure that the next time i travel to bangkok, the hotel in bangkok i choose must be ibis nana.

name: Eleven Hotel Bangkok
detail: Very Disappointed!!! I just wished Agoda agency or Eleven Bangkok hotel that let’s us know they are under or just done with a renewal or under a construction . We walked in our bedroom with the smell of a new paint color everyday. Even walking in the hotel front desk still smell that bad color smell sometimes. Which it was very bad for my health!!! I booked this hotel because it’s close to a hospital and a good deal. I stayed at Eleven Bangkok hotel to go check for my health condition. On my Second day staying around 12-1:30 AM, I still heard a sound of construction until I called a front desk. Every thing was quite again. I booked this hotel from 12-19 August, but I have to leave 2 days early after I done with my doctor appointments. Cause this hotel condition made my health getting bad. Even though, their are a good staffs there to help eliminate our bedroom every day. However, I have to breathing and sleeping with new painting color everyday.

name: QUEENSLAND HOTEL BANGKOK
detail: We spent 3 nights here, and we were so happy to stay here.

name: Ruamchitt Plaza Hotel
detail: OK, it is rare to have a hotel in bangkok where smoking is allowed and it was quite a stay for us. It was very quiet hotel too so you can sleep well at night. It was not a bad hotel at all. For that price, I think it is all worthwhile. I would give five stars if they gave me bottle water the first day when I checked in, so next time, give me water! LOL... Roberson is nearby and so as all transportation. If you are looking to snack shopping, Roberson can fulfill all your snack needs. There were quite a lot of nice restaurants nearby and across the road as well. And there is an old book store nearby and it was a germ! I would definitely stay in this hotel next time. My suggestion, probably better ventilation before check in, it was quite hot in bangkok with the sun shine directly, no amount of air condition can cool the room down in an instant. Also, better television, it was almost impossible to watch anything, the reception was very bad.

name: Montraj Continent Sukhumvit Bangkok
detail: I enjoyed the stay at the Continent. It clearly follows a successful formula for Bangkok of providing a sophisticated product that comes across as having all the frills. The staff we genuinely hospitable and very efficient and professional and were helpful throughout which is a standard for all the better hotels in Bangkok. Ftether than that I would say my experience of the staff was on a par with hotels that might be charging a rate of 50% more. It does not really have the size and scale to feel like a 5 star property, I think that it is better classed as a very good quality boutique 4-star hotel. The rooms like the above indicates were well thought out with sexy design elements and fairly good quality fittings and maintenance but uses a lot of clever design ideas to mask the fact that they are not in fact all that large hence my reluctance to agree that it is a 5-star property. That said it was a quality and enjoyable experience staying in the room. Certainly for the price the hotel delivered plenty of value and is an easy recommendation to friends and family who want to stay. -there also was not much sign of any of the sleaziness that can be evident in other hotels in Bangkok.
